# Chris Portka

> Bay Area songwriter and multi-instrumentalist based in Berkeley, California. Releases folk, psych, experimental rock, and ambient records. Most recent album: *The Album Everyone Wants* (2025), co-produced with Jasper Leach at Sear Sound (NYC) and Brothers (Chinese) Recording (Oakland).

Stylistic touchstones cited by press and listeners include Captain Beefheart, Sparklehorse, Gillian Welch, Silver Jews, and David Berman. Nine albums released since 2020.

## Current release

- [The Album Everyone Wants (2025)](https://chrisportka.com/releases/the-album-everyone-wants): 11 songs — 4 originals and 7 covers (Syd Barrett, Skip Spence, George Jones, Alan Wilson/Canned Heat, Mayo Thompson, Fred Eaglesmith, Brasil). Pressed on limited-edition sparkle black vinyl.
- [Buy vinyl (Seek Collective)](https://www.seekcollective.com/products/vinyl-the-album-everyone-wants)
- [Listen on Bandcamp](https://cportka.bandcamp.com/album/the-album-everyone-wants)

## Catalog and earlier work

- [Trash Music (2023)](https://chrisportka.com/releases/trash-music): lo-fi folk and outsider songwriting; 12 songs, limited vinyl run of 250.
- [Earlier work](https://chrisportka.com/earlier-work)
- [Full catalog on Bandcamp](https://cportka.bandcamp.com)
